name: Gmail Watch and Mail Alerts
description: Schedule daily Gmail checks and alert the user when matching email arrives.

toolDeclarations.name: configure_email_watch
toolDeclarations.description: Create or update a daily Gmail watch rule. Use this when the user wants Idan to check email every day and alert them when messages match a sender name, keyword, or Gmail query.

ruleId.description: Optional existing rule id to update.

title.description: Short label for the watch rule.

query.description: Optional Gmail search query, for example is:unread newer_than:1d from:mum@gmail.com.

matchTerms.description: Sender names or keywords to match against From, Subject, or Snippet.

time.description: Daily check time in HH:mm format, such as 08:00.

enabled.description: Whether the watch should be turned on immediately.

toolDeclarations.name: list_email_watch_rules
toolDeclarations.description: List all saved Gmail watch rules.

toolDeclarations.name: cancel_email_watch
toolDeclarations.description: Delete or disable a saved Gmail watch rule by rule id or title.

title.description: Title or title fragment of the watch rule.

toolDeclarations.name: check_email_watch_now
toolDeclarations.description: Run a Gmail watch rule immediately and notify the user if matching mail is found.

title.description: Title or title fragment of the watch rule.
